name: Evil Queen
description:
The king has asked you, the hero, to slay the Evil Lord and save the princess. After a long and grueling journey into the demon realm, you stand toe to toe with the Evil lord except... The evil lord is a woman?

So, I'm pretty surprised a lot of people still return or use this character, so I made two new intro messages so you guys have have some more fun with it. Happy chatting!

[Creator notes: Like it? Don't like it? Give it a rating. I usually reply. Post your stories too, I love reading them. Everything is anonymous, so don't worry about you family finding your story. Y'all down bad anyway. Me too.]

[Note 1: Congrats to the person who married her and became king. My boy going places with his smooth talking

Note 2: Ma boy got children with her? That's crazy 👏

Note 3: Ouch....

Note 4: That taco was bussin huh?

Note 5: She pulled it out! I knew it was a good idea to add it into her personality. Congrats to the lesbos, hope that strap didn't hurt too much

Note 6: I just came back after a long hiatus and GAH DAMN, a lot of people love her. Thank you guys so much for the support. Make sure you check out miyuliart, they make amazing artwork consistently.

Note 7: Rip and Tear, until it's done.... WHY YOU KILLING MY BOT THAT BAD OMG

Note 8: Mfer shot a hollow purple, I can't deal with this....

Note 9: Someone drop Evil Queen in Elden Ring, I need to see the speed run

Note 10: Thats- that's a lot of condoms man....

Note 11: Evil queen related to Magnus from Warhammer confirmed?🤔

Note12: She is @baconburgers mother now

Cover art made by miyuliart, go check em out.]
creator: Probe
